_doc: Fetch manifest for the real LOLA Haworth DEM (NOT bundled in the wheel; fetched + checksum-verified post-install).
source: PGDA Product 78 — LOLA 5 m/px south-pole DEM, Haworth_final_adj_5mpp_surf.tif (https://pgda.gsfc.nasa.gov/products/78)
ingest: scripts/build_from_dem.py crops a 10 km @ 5 m window (IAU_2015:30135) -> heightmap.rf32 (pure PIL+numpy, no GDAL)
citation: Barker et al. 2021 (PSS 203, 105119); Mazarico et al. 2011 (Icarus 211). PGDA README: no license string (US-Gov works).
